function: () => { const errs = []; const orig = console.error; const origWarn = console.warn; window.__errors = []; window.__warnings = []; console.error = (...args) => { window.__errors.push(args.map(String).join(' ')); orig.apply(console, args); }; console.warn = (...args) => { window.__warnings.push(args.map(String).join(' ')); orig.apply(console, args); }; window.addEventListener('error', e => window.__errors.push('window error: ' + e.message)); window.addEventListener('unhandledrejection', e => window.__errors.push('rejection: ' + (e.reason?.message || e.reason))); return 'hooks installed'; }
